title: Prehistoric Adventures
body:
so, this is mod on dinosaurus. This mod adds prehistoric creatures that roam the world around.

all creatures:
aqua - pillager
arandaspis
archosaurus: tameable with protorosaurus meat. When low health, stands on his hind legs, increasing damage.
battle dunkleosteus: aqua - pillager squad included
battle tyrannosaurus: same as normal tyrannosaurus, but has a pillager squad included.
cephalaspis
deinotherium: strong elephant. Drops meat, bones, and tusk. Tameable with leaves and can be riden.
dimetrodon: in this mod, he is semi - aquatic. Drops meat. Tameable with dimetrodon meat (strange, but who said that they not eated each other?)
dunkleosteus: when killing drowned, has a chance to drop smithing templates.
estemmenosuchus: tameable with sea grass. Can be ridden. Drops horns, wich can be used to upgrade iron helmet
gigantopithecus: tameable with bamboo. We can put special armor on him.
haikouichtys
helicoprion: drops tooths, wich can be used to upgrade iron sword
infected fish: boss. Can't be found right now.
lystrosaurus: tameable with potatoes/carrots/betroots. Digs up seeds and potatoes/carrots
Megaloceros: tameable with golden carrots. Can be riden, drops leather and meat.
meganeura
morganucodon: kills silverfishes, deal extra damage to arthropods. Can be tamed.
nothosaurus
protorosaurus: drop meat.
tiktaalik
tyrannosaurus rex: very strong. Drops scales and tooth, and also bones.
xiphactinus: storng. Spawns in gangs. Drops meat and tooth.

plants:
siggilaria
lepidodendron

structures:
hunter base
meteorite
pelt tent

weapons and tools:
saw sword: craft from iron sword and five helicoprion tooth (can be found in hunter base)
tooth dagger: crafts from stick and tyrannosaurus tooth
tusk woodcutter: axe. Crafts from deinotherium tusk, stick and bone

armor:
reinfoced: crafts from tyrannosaurus scales and leather
dinosaur bone: better that netherite. Crafts from deinotherium bones
upgraded dinosaur bone: even better. Crafts on smithing table.
gigantopithecus armor: armor for gigantopithecus. Crafts from wood and strings.
